page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m1.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores operating at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 1:1 ratio of memory to virtual CPUs with 1.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server type does not include any bundled local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring network-attached storage for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with the instance.

With 32 dedicated physical cores and a 1:1 CPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is designed for compute-bound workloads that do not require large memory footprints. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the low memory-to-CPU ratio minimizes memory overhead expenses, making it a specialized option for parallel processing, batch computing, and CPU-intensive tasks such as video encoding or distributed compute nodes.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m1.8xlarge is an x86_64 compute-focused server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores operating at 2.7 GHz and 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a 1.0 GB per core resource ratio. The instance features a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps and does not include local storage, relying entirely on external block storage. With dedicated CPU allocation and a 1:1 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this server is optimized for compute-heavy workloads that require high parallel processing power without massive memory requirements. It is well-suited for batch processing, distributed computing, and CPU-intensive workloads where memory overhead can be minimized to optimize resource density and cost efficiency.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m1.8xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for compute-intensive workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core compute-focused instance with a one-to-one CPU-to-RAM ratio and 16 Gbps network bandwidth for parallel processing workloads.
